---
title: "The crystal chemistry and reactivity of ternary Na2Fe3Cl8 from the NaCl-FeCl2 system and its potential application as coating layer for cathode in sodium ion batteries"
author: ["Liliana T. López Ch.", "Franklin Jaramillo", "Jorge A. Calderón", "José L. Tirado", "Elena Akhmatskaya", "Mauricio R. Bonilla"]
date: 2023-12-15
publication: "Journal of Alloys and Compounds, **968**, 172123 (2023)."
categories: ["Li-ion"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jallcom.2023.172123
url_preprint:
journ: "The Journal of Physical Chemistry C"
issue: 968
page: 172123
year: 2023
image: featured.png
pub_number: 9

---
